auth.title: Welcome back
auth.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a login link.
auth.sentDesc: We sent a login link to {email}. Check your inbox.
auth.linkExpired: This link has expired or is invalid. Please try again.
auth.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

profile.title: My profile
profile.displayNameHint: Shown on your listings (first name recommended).

hero.title: Finding a flat abroad —
hero.subtitle: The German-speaking platform for apartments in Paris and London. By Germans, for Germans — transparent, direct, no agency fees.

values.title: Why Wohnen Abroad?
values.v1Desc: Connect with other German speakers in Paris and London. All listings from real people in the community — no spam, no ghost listings.
values.v2Desc: You contact landlords or subtenants directly in German. No commission, no middlemen, no misunderstandings.
values.v3Desc: Magic-link login with no password. Suspicious listings can be reported. Founded by HEC alumni who know the struggle of finding a flat abroad.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Search Paris or London, filter by price, area, size and furnishing.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Message the landlord or subtenant directly in German — no agents, no detours.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Arrange a viewing and find your new home abroad.

items.a: Yes — posting and searching listings is completely free, for renters and landlords alike.
For German speakers looking to rent or let in Paris or London — expats, students, au pairs, interns and anyone else.
Currently Paris and London. More cities are planned — if your city is missing, feel free to reach out.

items.q: What types of listings are there?
items.a: Full apartments, flatshare rooms, and sublets. Furnished and unfurnished. Short and long term.

items.q: How do you protect my data?
items.a: We store only what is necessary. Your exact address is never shown publicly. All data is processed GDPR-compliantly.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Create a free account and find or list in minutes.

create.title: Post a new listing
create.listingTitleHint: e.g. "Bright flatshare room in the 11th arr."
create.descriptionHint: Describe the apartment, location, highlights, etc.
create.loginRequired: You must be logged in to post a listing.

footer.tagline: Finding a flat abroad — in German.
footer.hecByline: An initiative by HEC Paris alumni.
